title: City Detect, which uses AI to help cities stay safe and clean, raises $13M Series A
description: City Detect, a company that helps local governments prevent urban decay, is in at least 17 cities so far, including Dallas and Miami.

title: Hardware testing startup Nominal hits $1B valuation, raises $155M in 10 months
description: Nominal provides hardware testing equipment to defense tech companies. Founders Fund led the preemptive deal.

title: Zeno raises $25M to speed up production of its battery-swap motorbikes
description: The startup, co-founded by Tesla and Apple alumni, has sold nearly 1,000 of its motorbikes so far.

title: Science Corp. raises $230M as it races to bring its brain implant to market
description: A source close to the company says the round assigns Science a post-money valuation of $1.25 billion.

title: Lio raises $30M from Andreessen Horowitz and others to automate enterprise procurement
description: AI procurement startup Lio announced a $30 million Series A in a round led by Andreessen Horowitz.

title: Decagon completes first tender offer at $4.5B valuation
description: The AI-powered customer support startup is the latest example of a fast-growing, young company that's providing employee liquidity.
